title: orchiodes cordatum
intro: Orchiodes cordatum, also known as Himalayan orchid or Gagea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Orchiodes cordatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an anti-septic agent. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusion or decoction, where the roots and flowers are steeped in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
